text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I ran like crazy today. My times are lookin'
good too. I've gotta keep this up.
choice_data_list: Do you want to call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm gonna give it a bit more. My legs are
itchin' to move.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You can go back without me, Teach!

We're halfway into summer camp. Hishi Amazon
has her full attention on the Shuka Sho and the
Arima Kinen. Not a day has passed by without a
solo training session.

She's making remarkable progress. I'm positive
she's well on her way to becoming the ideal
version of herself. However...
Beep!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian has scored a tremendous victory!

She finished with an incredible five-length lead,
astounding everyone with her beast-like run in
the Japanese Derby in the early summer.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's like she gets better with every race. Is she
headed for the Kikuka Sho next? Man, I can't
wait!

Narita Brian has been making strides at summer
camp too, and right now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What the?! This scrimmage is something else!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Brian is pulling farther away from the others...
Gosh, it's like watching an adult race against
children.

She dominates the race with her unbelievable
power, finishing over ten lengths ahead of the
competition.
choice_data_list: (Will Hishi Amazon be all right at this rate?)
(Will Hishi Amazon be all right at this rate?)

text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I think back to what she told me
before.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can't get that one-on-one between Brian and
the president out of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The entire field was silent, burning with tension.
They took the crowd's breath away.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's when I realized something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm worthy of having a one-on-one
with Brian—not as I am now!

Seeing her so bitterly frustrated was honestly
quite a shock to me.
choice_data_list:
(I don't want to see her make that face ever
again...)

text_block_list.text:
We have to make our time at this summer camp
worth it, and convert it into fuel for Hishi Amazon
to grow.

The number of sleepless nights I continue to have
is directly proportional to the desire I have to
make her wish come true.
Then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Hey, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...You've been kinda off lately. You're always
staring out into space or zoning out when I'm
talkin'.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If you've got worries, I got ears to listen to 'em
with!
It looks like my lack of sleep is catching up to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? I mean, your complexion isn't
lookin' too great.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Are you getting enough sleep? And are you
eating properly? I can whip up somethin' that's
easy to digest for ya.
I wouldn't want to get in the way of her training.

In order to change the subject, I quickly show her
a core training regimen adapted for the beach
that I extracted from a bigger set of materials.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, this is all startin' to feel really weird. It's
like you've got a new regimen for me almost
every day.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're kinda all over the place. Like you're antsy
about somethin'... Or no, it's more like...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling nervous about something?

My attempt to throw Hishi Amazon off my scent
fails miserably, and training ends with her still
suspicious of me.

The following day, I head for the beach, ready for
some more training, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Teach! Training's canceled for today! We're
holding a scrimmage instead!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I had a talk with the president, and we decided
that the winner will receive a year's worth of
high-quality protein powder.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That prize was good enough to round up some
real strong contenders. Well, why don't you come
and watch the race?

She doesn't even let me get a word in edgewise
and sits me down in the shade. The scrimmage
kicks off shortly after.

There are seventeen racers in total, and all of
them have won graded races before.

Yet despite the steep competition, Hishi Amazon
blasts past them all at a tremendous speed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
Is it just me, or is Hishiama exuding way more
intensity than before? Just look at that explosive
power...

The final turn is moments ahead. She gains speed
from the outside and surges to the front!

text_block_list.name: Scrimmage Racer
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

Two other racers vie for the lead, unwilling to
lose. The racers behind them also pick up the
pace, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to youuu!

Hishi Amazon flies across the sand, peeling away
from her competition in the blink of an eye.
She wins by a sweeping margin.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Hishiama has always been the gutsy type, but it feels like she suddenly got way better.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's almost scary how good she's gotten!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Teach, whaddya make of that?! You still
think I'm some weakling that needs you to fuss
over her?

In the same way that Narita Brian has become a
beast of a racer...

Hishi Amazon has made tremendous leaps in
strength and resilience this past spring and
summer.
choice_data_list: I'm so sorry I doubted you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You finally come to your senses? Don't go
losing your head, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I may not look it, but I'm the sort of Umamusume
who'll never stop reaching higher.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you know what? Beyond doubt, you're the
one who helped me get this far!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So don't sweat the small stuff, and let's just give
everything our very best!

We're in this together. If we don't trust each
other, we'll never be on the same page.

I can't believe I lost sight of the most important
thing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's my line...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Anyway! No more doom and gloom, you hear?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So what's the plan for today?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good. You can't do much without a bit of
muscle on ya!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we work out right here on the beach?
We're already here and all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll start with 500 high knees!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

Hishi Amazon throws her complete all into
training. She zips around so fast, my eyes can
barely keep up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, sounds good! You know, I just spotted this
huge rock!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: How about pulling that round the island?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, right on! Okay, let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haaah! Push it to the limiiit!

In the blink of an eye, she peels off with the
massive rock, heading beyond the shore.
